name: Lexeo Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Lexeo Therapeutics is a clinical stage genetic medicine company developing AAV-based gene therapies for cardiovascular diseases, including LX2006 for FA cardiomyopathy and LX2020 for PKP2-ACM.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage genetic medicine company dedicated to reshaping heart health by applying pioneering science to fundamentally change how cardiovascular diseases are treated.

catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate the LX2006 pivotal study in the first half of 2026, pending finalization of the trial protocol.
